assertions.title: Error state — UI displays error when .bropilot directory is missing

steps.action: Temporarily rename repo .bropilot directory, open /domain/, click Start Domain Modeling
steps.expected: User-facing initialization error appears (not unhandled exception)
steps.observed: Error banner displayed: "no .bropilot directory found — run `mix bro.init` first"

steps.action: Check browser console and restore .bropilot directory
steps.expected: No console exceptions and environment restored
steps.observed: No console errors emitted for this flow; .bropilot restored immediately after assertion

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start -> 400 {"error":"no .bropilot directory found — run `mix bro.init` first"}

assertions.title: Malformed LLM output returns error without advancing state

steps.action: Start domain worker with malformed mode and restore UI into step3 state
steps.expected: Extraction path uses malformed output mode
steps.observed: POST /api/domain/start with mode=malformed returned step3 prompt; /api/domain/status showed step=step3
Error banner displayed: "Extraction failed. \"malformed LLM output: expected valid YAML but got garbage data\""

steps.expected: Worker remains pre-step3_done and user can retry
steps.observed: /api/domain/status remained step=step3 after first and second attempts; Submit & Extract stayed available for retry

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start (mode=malformed) -> 200; POST /api/domain/input -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract -> 400 malformed output; GET /api/domain/status before/after/retry -> step3

steps.action: Navigate across all sidebar routes (/, /problem/, /solution/, /work/, /knowledge/, /vibe/, /domain/, /er/, /traceability/, /build/, /connect/) and inspect .sidebar-link.active
steps.expected: Exactly one active sidebar link on each page, matching current route
steps.observed: All 11 routes reported activeCount=1 and active href matched current route, including /connect/

steps.action: Capture screenshot on /connect/ showing active sidebar state
steps.expected: Connect link active on connect page

evidence.consoleErrors: Unexpected token ':' (observed while traversing /build/ during sidebar flow)
evidence.network: GET page navigations returned 200 across all 11 sidebar routes

assertions.title: Partial pipeline — Solution page shows available data only

steps.action: Prepare partial state: run Act2 step3 (mock) only, then ensure specs slot is empty
steps.expected: Domain model data present while Step4 specs remain pending
steps.observed: Step3 extract returned populated domain model; PUT /api/map/solution/specs set specs to {}

steps.action: Open /solution/ and inspect Domain Model + Specifications sections
steps.expected: Domain data visible; specs shown as pending (not errors)
steps.observed: Vocabulary/Domain Entities/Flows rendered with data; each spec tab displayed "Spec expansion pending — run Act 2 Step 4..."

steps.expected: No JS errors for this flow

evidence.network: POST /api/domain/start (mode=mock) -> 200; POST /api/domain/input -> 200; POST /api/domain/extract -> 200 step3_done; PUT /api/map/solution/specs -> 200; GET /solution/ -> 200

frictions.description: agent-browser network request log returned 'No requests captured' for some interactions, so API status evidence was collected with direct curl calls.
frictions.resolution: Used curl for request/response status evidence while keeping UI assertions verified through screenshots and DOM text.

frictions.description: Domain page UI does not expose a malformed mode toggle for extraction tests.
frictions.resolution: Pre-started Act2 worker with mode=malformed via API and restored domain page to step3 using localStorage session state before UI submit.

frictions.description: A persistent console error ('Unexpected token :') appears after visiting /build/ during sidebar navigation checks.
frictions.resolution: Recorded as non-blocking friction because active-link behavior still validated successfully.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked, 0 skipped.
